headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Slash Losses, Oil Prices Fall Amid Trump, Netanyahu Iran War Comments
summary: Stocks came off 2026 lows and oil prices reversed lower amid Iran war comments from President Trump and Israeli PM Netanyahu. Tesla stock broke key levels.

headline: DELL's AI Server Momentum Surges: Can It Drive Long-Term Growth?

headline: Former Tesla AI Chief Andrej Karpathy Knew He Was Getting 'Secret Gift' From Nvidia And After Getting A Hint He 'Knew It Had To Be Good'
summary: Andrej Karpathy reacted enthusiastically after Nvidia delivered its first DGX Station GB300 deskside AI supercomputer, highlighting a broader shift toward powerful local systems for developing trillion-parameter, agentic AI models.

headline: Dell, Weyerhaeuser, Visa: A Cross-Sector Look at Former Stock Picks
summary: Dell Technologies  was introduced by Jacob Sonenshine in October.  Weyerhaeuser  was covered by Andrew Bary in December.  Dell is showing relative strength in 2026, up 21% while the benchmark  is down 3%.

headline: Dell Reshapes Costs And Bets On AI Voice Infrastructure Partnerships
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has reduced its global workforce by more than 10% for a third consecutive year as part of an ongoing cost management program. The company is consolidating facilities and limiting hiring while continuing to invest in AI driven business transformation initiatives. Dell recently formed a partnership with Penguin Solutions and Deepgram to deliver production ready AI voice solutions built on Dell hardware. Dell sits at the center of enterprise IT infrastructure,...
